title: John (disambiguation)
content:
'''John''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[John D. Branon]]''', [[Red Four]] at the [[Battle of Yavin]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[John D. Branon/Legends|John D. Branon]]''', [[Red Four/Legends|Red Four]] at the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]

==Real world==
===Actors===
*'''[[John Altman]]''', an uncredited extra who portrayed a [[Rebel pilot]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]
*'''[[John Armstrong]]''', voice of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in numerous video games
*'''[[John Beasley]]''', an actor who portrayed a [[Unidentified bartender (Pagodon)|bartender]] in "[[Chapter 1: The Mandalorian]]"
*'''[[John Boyega]]''', the actor portraying [[Finn]] in the [[sequel trilogy]]
*'''[[John Callen]]'''
*'''[[John Cameron]]''', actor of [[Frog Man]]
*'''[[John Chapman]]''', an actor
*'''[[John Considine]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Coppinger]]''', actor of [[Graxol Kelvyyn]]
*'''[[John Cygan]]''', voice actor in video games and audio dramas
*'''[[John Dicks]]''', an actor
*'''[[John DiMaggio]]''', voiced [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and [[Sha'a Gi]] in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''
*'''[[John Dixon]]''', a stuntman
*'''[[John Dukakis]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Ennis]]''', the voice of [[Fleck]]
*'''[[John Fensom]]''', actor and special effects artist
*'''[[John Gavam]]'''
*'''[[John Harkins]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Hollis]]''', portrayed [[Lobot]] in ''The Empire Strikes Back''
*'''[[John Randolph Jones]]''', a voice actor in [[Tales of the Jedi (audio)|''Tales of the Jedi'']]
*'''[[John Kapelos]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Ketteringham]]''', actor who portrayed [[Ryle Torsyn]]
*'''[[John Leguizamo]]''', voice actor of [[Gor Koresh]]
*'''[[John Lithgow]]''', voiced [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] in the [[Star Wars (radio)|radio adaptations]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']]
*'''[[John Maloney]]'''
*'''[[John McEvoy]]'''
*'''[[John McLaughlin]]'''
*'''[[John Mogridge]]'''
*'''[[John Morton]]''', portrayed [[Dak Ralter]] in ''The Empire Strikes Back''
*'''[[John Pedrick]]'''
*'''[[John Pielmeier]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Ratzenberger]]''', portrayed Major [[Bren Derlin]] in ''The Empire Strikes Back''
*'''[[John Rosengrant]]''', puppeteer and actor for Gor Koresh
*'''[[John Simpkin]]'''
*'''[[John Stocker]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Sylla]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Tui]]''', actor who portrayed [[Korso]]
*'''[[John Tynan]]'''
*'''[[John Wayne]]''', voice actor of [[Garindan ezz Zavor|Garindan]]
*'''[[John Wehrmann]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[John Welsh]]''', a voice actor
*'''[[Keston John]]'''

===Animators===
*'''[[John Dodelson]]''', a visual effects modeler on ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
*'''[[John Lin]]''', a layout artist on ''The Clone Wars''
*'''[[John Torrijos]]'''
*'''[[John Wash]]''', an animator on ''A New Hope''

===Artists===
*'''[[John Aldrich]]''', a comic book letterer who worked on [[Marvel Comics]]' ''[[Dark Lord's Conscience]]'' and ''[[Blind Fury!]]''
*'''[[John Alvin]]''', an illustrator for various ''[[Star Wars]]'' works
*'''[[John Bell]]''', an illustrator for ''[[Monsters and Aliens from George Lucas]]''
*'''[[John Berkey]]''', an illustrator of posters and cover art
*'''[[John Bolton]]''', an artist
*'''[[John Byrne]]''', a cover artist
*'''[[John Cassaday]]''', a comic illustrator
*'''[[John Charles]]''', a colourist
*'''[[John Tyler Christopher]]''', a comic artist
*'''[[John Costanza]]''', an illustrator and letterer for [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] comics
*'''[[John Dollar]]''', an illustrator
*'''[[John Gallagher]]''', an artist
*'''[[John Giang]]''', a comic book artist
*'''[[John Harris]]''', a cover artist
*'''[[John Paul Lona]]''', [[West End Games]] illustrator
*'''[[John McCrea]]''', a comic book artist
*'''[[John Morelli]]''', a letterer
*'''[[John Nadeau]]''', the cover artist for many issues of ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' comics
*'''[[John Jude Palencar]]''', a cover artist
*'''[[John Park]]''', a concept artist
*'''[[John Rauch]]''', colorist of ''[[All for You]]''
*'''[[John Robinson]]''', an illustrator
*'''[[John Romita Sr.]]''', a penciller and cover artist
*'''[[John K. Snyder III]]''', provided the cover art for ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine]]''
*'''[[John Stanko]]''', an artist
*'''[[John Stokes]]''', a comic artist
*'''[[John Tartaglione]]''', an inker
*'''[[John Van Fleet]]''', an illustrator for numerous ''Star Wars'' titles
*'''[[John Wycough]]''', an inker

===Authors===
*'''[[John Barber]]''', author and former Senior Editor for [[IDW Publishing]]
*'''[[John Gregory Betancourt]]''', an author
*'''[[John Crowdis]]''', a roleplaying game author
*'''[[John S. Davis]]''', a journalist
*'''[[John Dunivant]]''', a short story author
*'''[[John Dunn]]''', a [[Fantasy Flight Games]] author
*'''[[John Beyer]]''', author of some ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplements
*'''[[John Marc DeMatteis]]''', a comic writer
*'''[[John Hazlett]]''', author of "[[The Written Word]]"
*'''[[John Jackson Miller]]''', author of comics, novels and short stories
*'''[[John Ostrander]]''', [[Dark Horse Comics]] writer
*'''[[John Peel]]''', author of ''[[Star Wars Journal: The Fight for Justice]]''
*'''[[John J. Richardson III]]''', roleplaying game author
*'''[[John Snead]]''', writer and RPG designer
*'''[[John Stephenson]]''', a comic author
*'''[[John Terra]]''', an author and game designer
*'''[[John Wagner]]''', comic writer
*'''[[John Whitman]]''', author of the ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'' series
*'''[[John Zinser]]''', an RPG author

===Directors===
*'''[[John Barry]]''', production designer on [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] and second unit director of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]
*'''[[John Korty]]''', director of ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]''
*'''[[John Madden]]''', director of the [[Star Wars radio dramas|''Star Wars'' radio dramas]]

===Editors===
*'''[[John Chesterman]]''', a contributing editor
*'''[[John Freeman]]''', an editor and author
*'''[[John Gilroy]]''', a film editor
*'''[[John Jympson]]''', editor of the "Lost Cut"
*'''[[John May]]''', contributing editor of ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine
*'''[[John Phillip Peecher]]''', editor of ''[[The Making of Star Wars: Return of the Jedi]]''
*'''[[John Bradley Snyder]]''', editor of [[Star Wars Insider 30|''Star Wars Insider'' 30]]

===Game developers===
*'''[[John Bible]]''', a graphics programmer
*'''[[John Campbell]]''', a ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' artist
*'''[[John Carsey]]''', a quality services computer technician
*'''[[John Cassells]]''', a video game graphics artist
*'''[[John Samuel Gallagher]]''', director of concept art for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*'''[[John Hannon]]''', a "[[LucasArts]] I.S."
*'''[[John Henke]]''', a sound designer for ''KOTOR''
*'''[[John Morgan]]''', a developer at [[Obsidian Entertainment]]
*'''[[John Santos]]''', an in-game animator
*'''[[John Stafford]]''', a video game writer
*'''[[John Winski]]''', a designer

===Musicians===
*'''[[John Barbata]]''', the drummer for the rock band [[Jefferson Starship]] and their [[in-universe]] [[Unidentified Human band|counterparts]]
*'''[[John Powell]]''', composer for ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''
*'''[[John Williams]]''', composer of the [[Star Wars saga|''Star Wars'' saga]] films

===Photographers and camera people===
*'''[[John Campbell (cameraman)|John Campbell]]''', an assistant cameraman
*'''[[John B. Field]]''', the cinematographer for ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'', and technical director for the [[George Lucas' Star Tours|George Lucas' ''Star Tours'']] TV special
*'''[[John Jay]]''', the still photographer for ''A New Hope''
*'''[[John Keen]]''', a second assistant cameraman
*'''[[John C. Moulds]]''', an optical camera assistant
*'''[[John Schwartzman]]''', a director of photography

===Producers===
*'''[[John Bartnicki]]''', co-producer on ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett]]''
*'''[[John Hampian]]''', [[Lucasfilm]] vice-president of physical production
*'''[[John McCormack]]''', a producer and writer
*'''[[John Swartz]]''', co-producer of [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''The Force Awakens'']], ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'', and ''Solo''

===Sound personnel===
*'''[[John Benson]]''', the assistant sound editor for ''The Empire Strikes Back'' and sound editor for ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''
*'''[[John Roesh]]''', a foley assistant

===Special effects personnel===
*'''[[John Dykstra]]''', a special effects supervisor
*'''[[John Goodson]]''', a model maker and digital artist
*'''[[John Knoll]]''', Visual Effects Supervisor and Chief Creative Officer of [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]]
*'''[[John Pakenham]]''', a model maker
*'''[[John Stears]]''', a special effects supervisor

===Other people===
*'''[[John Clark]]''', a rigging gaffer
*'''[[John Gaeta]]''', [[ILMxLAB]] executive creative director
*'''[[John Geoghegan]]''', former Lucasfilm Vice President of Marketing
*'''[[John Glover]]''', narrator of the [[Red Harvest (audiobook)|audiobook]] of [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']]
*'''[[John Hatt]]''', an electrical engineer
*'''[[John Mollo]]''', costume designer
*'''[[John Mulder]]''', a contributor to [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]]
*'''[[John Strejan]]''', a paper engineer
*'''[[John Wong]]''', a model
